content: Most existing Self-Refine frameworks rely on single-perspective self-feedback for iterative improvement, which can get stuck in local optima because the model cannot identify blind spots in its own reasoning. Integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into Self-Refine can break through this bottleneck, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that still retains the original advantage of requiring no additional supervised training or fine-tuning.
